subject: Q3 board deck review -- need feedback by Thursday
body: Hi Marcos, attached is the Q3 board deck. Can you review the AI infrastructure section and send feedback before Thursday afternoon?

subject: Durable workflow notes from Monday
body: Sharing notes from Monday's discussion on checkpointing, retries, and approval gates for assistant workflows.

subject: Reminder: Board meeting prep with Sarah
body: This is a reminder for the board meeting prep session with Sarah Chen on Friday.

subject: Staging worker restart completed
body: The staging worker pool restarted after the deploy and all health checks are green.

subject: Draft blog post on agent reliability
body: Could you review the draft post on durable agent workflows, human approval, and idempotent side effects?

subject: May AI provider spend
body: Attached is the May model provider spend report with token usage broken down by workflow and model.

subject: Candidate packet for backend systems interview
body: Please review the packet before tomorrow's interview loop for the backend systems candidate.

subject: Assistant approval queue metrics
body: The weekly product metrics show approval queue latency and completion rates for email assistant routines.

subject: Runbook update: provider timeout handling
body: The runbook now includes model provider timeout handling, fallback order, and telemetry fields.

subject: Vendor agreement received
body: We received the vendor agreement. No action required until procurement completes their review.

subject: Weekly status notes
body: This week's status covers reliability work, customer escalations, and upcoming launch readiness.

subject: Follow-up on Q3 metrics
body: Can you confirm the model cost numbers before we finalize the board deck?

subject: Secrets rotation complete
body: Production API key rotation completed successfully for all worker services.

subject: Customer escalation: duplicate email sends
body: A customer reported duplicate sends after a retry. We need to review idempotency behavior.

subject: Context retrieval evaluation set
body: The new retrieval evaluation set includes email and calendar examples for token budget testing.

subject: PR #1842 merged
body: The checkpoint compaction PR was merged into main.

subject: Office closed Friday afternoon
body: The office will close Friday afternoon for facilities work.

subject: Launch checklist approval
body: Please approve the launch checklist after you verify workflow recovery and email send guards.

subject: SQLite WAL mode observations
body: WAL mode reduced lock contention in the local workflow runtime benchmark.

subject: Prospect asking about assistant reliability
body: A prospect asked how our assistant handles crashes, retries, approvals, and duplicate actions.

subject: Daily backup complete
body: SQLite backup completed for the workflow demo environment.

subject: Inference latency dashboard
body: The dashboard now breaks out p50 and p95 latency by provider and workflow step.

subject: Approval copy edits
body: I left comments on the approval prompt copy for assistant-drafted replies.

subject: Main branch green
body: All tests passed on main after the telemetry cleanup.

subject: README architecture pass
body: The README architecture section needs a shorter explanation of durable execution.

subject: Budget owner approval needed
body: Please approve the updated AI provider budget by end of day.

subject: Data retention policy reminder
body: Reminder: telemetry logs must not include secrets or raw credential values.

subject: Worker crash reproduction
body: We can now reproduce the worker crash by terminating the subprocess during an LLM call.

subject: AI systems roundtable invite
body: You're invited to a roundtable on reliable AI systems and operational patterns.

subject: Feature request: approval history
body: Several users asked for a history view showing who approved each assistant action.

subject: Model pricing update
body: We're updating token pricing next month. Let us know if you need revised estimates.

subject: Retry policy proposal
body: The proposal recommends one retry before provider fallback for long-running assistant steps.

subject: Context window regression
body: The latest experiment shows irrelevant calendar events crowding out useful prior emails.

subject: Can you reply to Sarah?
body: Sarah is asking about the board deck and needs a clear owner for feedback.

subject: Weekend maintenance complete
body: Maintenance completed without incidents. No action is needed.

subject: Workflow cost anomaly
body: One assistant routine generated unusually high token usage during context selection.

subject: Approval required for production access
body: Please approve production access for the new on-call engineer.

subject: Operational primitives glossary
body: The glossary now includes checkpoints, side effects, idempotency, and approval gates.

subject: Question about assistant workflow architecture
body: Would love your take on how to keep assistant workflows reliable under provider failures.

subject: Friday demo plan
body: Friday's demo will show crash recovery, approval, and duplicate-send prevention.

subject: Embedding evaluation notes
body: Embeddings improved recall, but TF-IDF remains easier to reason about for the reference runtime.

subject: Issue assigned: approval persistence
body: You were assigned an issue to verify approval queue persistence across restarts.

subject: Incident review training
body: The next training session covers root cause analysis for failed background workers.

subject: Benefits enrollment reminder
body: Open enrollment closes next week. No response is required if you already submitted choices.

subject: Board meeting agenda
body: The agenda includes Q3 metrics, AI spend, and reliability work for the assistant platform.

subject: Production deploy completed
body: The production deploy completed and workflow workers are processing normally.

subject: Customer asks for audit export
body: A customer wants an export of assistant actions, approval decisions, and model calls.

subject: Need feedback on routing policy
body: Can you review whether provider fallback should trigger on timeout, HTTP 500, or both?

subject: Weekly telemetry digest
body: This digest summarizes workflow duration, step counts, fallbacks, and approval wait time.

subject: Lunch menu
body: The lunch menu is posted for the week.
